metadata.name: Audio Transcription
metadata.description: Speech-to-text transcription using TranscriptionAgent with Whisper
metadata.author: Kaizen Team

inputs.name: Audio Path
inputs.description: Path to audio file (MP3, WAV, etc.)

documentation.overview: This workflow transcribes audio files to text using TranscriptionAgent powered by OpenAI's Whisper model. It supports multiple languages, formats, and can optionally provide word-level timestamps. Perfect for meeting transcriptions, podcast subtitles, voice commands, and accessibility applications.
use_cases: Call center quality assurance and analytics
Accessibility: audio content for hearing-impaired users
prerequisites: OpenAI API key configured as OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
Audio file accessible via file path
Supported formats: MP3, MP4, MPEG, MPGA, M4A, WAV, WEBM
Max file size: 25 MB (OpenAI Whisper limit)

example_outputs.transcription: Welcome to today's meeting. Let's start by reviewing the quarterly results. Revenue is up 15% compared to last quarter, which is excellent news. The marketing campaign was particularly successful in the EMEA region.

segments.text: Let's start by reviewing the quarterly results.
Revenue is up 15% compared to last quarter, which is excellent news.
The marketing campaign was particularly successful in the EMEA region.
